title: If they remade NGE in HD
display_title: If they remade NGE in HD
wikitext:
[]: If they remade NGE in HD...             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:12 pm What would you like to see? This has been brought up in a few of the re-release topics but I think it deserved a topic of it's own. Let me explain. If Gainax considered remaking NGE for the HD market, redrawing every cel scene for scene and dialogue word for word, the same NGE we know and love but brighter clearer and crisper. What little changes would you like them to make? I would quite like them to change a few goofs. Though I'm sure some of you might argue what's considered goofs and what is fan wank material. If you think this an affront to NGE, an epic Lucas/Spielberg ass rape to the series then just say so... I get it. Though saying I'm talking about rebuild is a bigger affront to NGE. Changes: -Unit 02's blood changed from blue to red. -Mecha size inconsistencies. -When it fits the story, always have Shinji wearing his plug suit while inside in the Eva. Mystery LCL plugsuit anyone? - Animation inconsistencies. Especially the very Ghibli looking episode 11.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:17 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:29 pm I'd love something like this, and I would buy the hell out of it. I think it'd be nice to see some of the visibly cheaply-produced scenes redesigned a bit, leaving the dialogue as-is but altering the visual production to take advantage of the increased budget and technological advances. For instance, the 'planning' scenes in episode 6 that consist of still silhouettes against bright lights; I wouldn't mind those going the way of the dodo. I think Rebuild 1.0 actually did something nifty with a moving camera to replace them, nicely accentuating the feel of urgency, but I might be thinking of another scene. The problem with any such project, though, is that while not making enough changes and attempted improvements could defeat the point, with every change made comes a chance to make a mistake, particularly with all the subtleties to be found in so much of NGE. A lot of caution would have to be exercised to ensure that any notably modified scenes were actually arguably better , rather than unthinkingly falling into the "new = better" assumption. The reaction to 26 episodes of Greedo shooting first would likely make the fan conflict over Rebuild seem comparatively inconsequential. Episodes 25 and 26 would be an interesting case for something like this; how much could their presentation be altered and "improved" without ruining what made them interesting to begin with? Could some of the recycled animation of characters speaking be replaced with new cels made specifically for those scenes, or was this reuse of bits and pieces of previous scenes and settings imperative to creating the atmosphere of instrumentality? Are there other ways that previous scenes could be referenced to take the place of this, and would it be an improvement? I think pretty much no matter what, there would inevitably be some changes made that some of us wouldn't be happy with and that others of us would probably love. Some of the controversial alterations might not even be intentional. I'm still hoping something along these lines is produced someday, though. Just keep Anno as far away from it as possible. No, seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:31 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: I think Shinji not wearing the plugsuit for the Zeruel battle helped accentuate the urgency. If they showed him changed into it, that would sort of take me out. If anything, get rid of the manifesting plugsuit that came from nowhere in the next episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:39 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Dec 04, 2010 11:45 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: You're confusing the episodes. For Leliel he had the plugsuit the whole time; the plugsuit appearing from nowhere was the incident/episode after Zeruel, when Shinji was tanged in the Eva for a month.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Dec 05, 2010 12:00 am esselfortium wrote: Episodes 25 and 26 would be an interesting case for something like this; how much could their presentation be altered and "improved" without ruining what made them interesting to begin with?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Dec 05, 2010 4:15 am I´ve been thinking about the SAME thing yesterday too. I´d watch it.

[]: Re: If they remade NGE in HD...             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Dec 05, 2010 7:29 am skikes wrote: -Mecha size inconsistencies.

[]: Re: If they remade NGE in HD...             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Dec 05, 2010 8:12 am I would so watch it. And dole money out for it. As far as the characterization and character development was actually faithful to the original series. Xard wrote: Omedeto, you just wrecked the whole story apart

[]: Re: If they remade NGE in HD...             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Dec 05, 2010 8:20 am BiQ wrote: Care to elaborate an example in NGE where evangelion size inconsistencies couldn't be fixed without wrecking the whole story apart?

[]: Re: If they remade NGE in HD...             Quote Post by BiQ » Sun Dec 05, 2010 8:56 am Xard wrote: End of Evangelion being most glaring example. Eva's height are modulated through the series according to needs of the scene composition etc. Shitloads of scenes would have to be "shot" from the scratch if eva's were forced to one constant height. Otherwise we'd get scenes were eva's are ludicruously huge or ridiculously small, bringing ruin to scenes in any case

[]: Re: If they remade NGE in HD...             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Dec 05, 2010 9:51 am BiQ wrote: Obviously there would be shitloads of scenes that needed to be redone with rather drastic tweaks, but I'm still not convinced it's actually impossible to do without wrecking the whole story apart.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Dec 31, 2010 2:47 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 31, 2010 3:10 pm Seele: Alternatively, Toji's inclusion in the scene could be 'integrated' a little better. I'm kind of with Xard about the 'leaving it untouched' bit. Going in with an attitude of revisionism would almost inevitably result in unnecessary changes. But, right, this is just fantasy. Carry on.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Dec 31, 2010 3:13 pm They have a HD Eva release. It's called Rebuild. As the Monkey said, you can't really upscale something filmed on 9mm, so the original will never see a HD release. That is unless they take the Fullmetal Alchemist route and make the entire series over again, but that is a very uncommon event in the anime industry. That being said, I'll leave you guys to your dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Dec 31, 2010 3:15 pm If you mean like a Eva version of Kai? I would not mind seeing a HD version of the original series one day.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 31, 2010 3:39 pm Ironfoot wrote: They have a HD Eva release. It's called Rebuild. As the Monkey said, you can't really upscale something filmed on 9mm, so the original will never see a HD release. That is unless they take the Fullmetal Alchemist route and make the entire series over again, but that is a very uncommon event in the anime industry. That being said, I'll leave you guys to your dreams.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Dec 31, 2010 4:03 pm Nah. I prefer NGE where it is. The very hand made aspect of the series is one of it's greatest charms. To recreate the whole thing from scratch, no changes whatsoever, would be a pretty thankless task. If I was some poor animator in Japan (thank the Lloyd I'm not) I can't imagine how thankless a task that would be. Spend a solid year or so of my life not being able to have even the slight creative freedom to animate a character in a way that is new. And Anno is Eva. Well, at leas the Eva that matters. You can take your Extended Universe merchandise and shoot it off into the Sun. Anno may allow his staff on Rebuild to create as much as possible but he's still the head of the operation. But yeah, even as an idea I just couldn't get behind giving NGE a "Facelift". In 10 years it'd be so antiquated in terms of animation that it would just need another. ...Though I wouldn't be surprised if Gainax is already thinking about doing this very project in 2015.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Dec 31, 2010 4:09 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: In 10 years it'd be so antiquated in terms of animation that it would just need another.
